<?php /** * SpecifiedECDomain * * From: http://www.secg.org/sec1-v2.pdf#page=109 * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * SpecifiedECDomain * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class SpecifiedECDomain { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'children' => [ 'version' => [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_INTEGER, 'mapping' => [1 => 'ecdpVer1', 'ecdpVer2', 'ecdpVer3'] ], 'fieldID' => FieldID::MAP, 'curve' => Curve::MAP, 'base' => ECPoint::MAP, 'order' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_INTEGER], 'cofactor' => [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_INTEGER, 'optional' => true ], 'hash' => ['optional' => true] + HashAlgorithm::MAP ] ]; }
